name: Madison Park
description: Madison Park is a place to play pickleball in El Dorado, AR. There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Mellor Park
description: Mellor Park is a place to play pickleball in El Dorado, AR. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Mount Holly Community Church
description: Mount Holly Community Church is a place to play pickleball in Mount Holly, AR. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
